tracks.rawText: 3:29Rising High Ptv5.5CoverBhangra, EDM, Desi Fusion with a stumbling-then-steady groove: syncopated acoustic guitar, marimba synth riff, and male vocals over sub-bass, Full electronic drums, dhol and tabla accents, punchy kick, sidechained synths, vocal harmonies, and driving percussion, Bright festival energy, crisp transients, layered dropsPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:42Rising High Ptv5.5CoverTropical pop with a bright, polished production, The arrangement features a syncopated acoustic guitar strumming pattern, a deep sub-bass, and a steady electronic drum kit with a crisp snare and sharp hi-hats, A recurring marimba-like synth melody provides a rhythmic hook, Male vocals are layered with harmonies in the chorus, The track includes a breakdown with a filtered synth lead and a rhythmic vocal chop, Key of G Major, 105 BPM1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Rising High Pt
